newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The record Q1 2026 order intake of EUR 3.6B (hydropower +230% incl. 3GW Saidongar pumped-storage) and unchanged FY guidance (EUR 8.0-8.3B revenue) were reported in April and already known; management framed Q1 as timing-driven. Stock +3.8% since June 9 on no new catalyst.

sources.label: Water Power: Andritz Q1 2026 hydro surge

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-node lens: no new evidence since June 9 connecting Andritz's hydro/pumps/process-automation to constrained datacenter power/water. Recent hydro orders predate the window and were in Q1 intake. +3.8% drift is flow. Hold at 84 on this demanding screen.
verdicts.bull: Power/water systems and pumped storage could indirectly support datacenter power ecosystems.
verdicts.neutral: Diversified industrial; AI linkage remains thin and indirect.
verdicts.bear: No datacenter-specific demand signal; classic capital-goods cyclical.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Power-grid/pumped-storage orders tied to load growth.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Capital-goods cyclicality; no direct AI exposure.
